uniequip_003_hodrer.name: Do or Die
uniequip_003_hodrer.EN: ATK increases to 110% when attacking an enemy; if the target is <$ba.stun>stunned</> or <$ba.root>bound</>, ATK further increases to 140%
uniequip_003_hodrer.CN: 攻击敌人时攻击力提升至110%, 若目标处于<$ba.stun>晕眩</>, <$ba.root>束缚</>则改为提升至140%
uniequip_003_hodrer.mod: 攻击敌人时攻击力提升至120%, 若目标处于<$ba.stun>晕眩</>, <$ba.root>束缚</>则改为提升至150%, 且对阻挡的敌人首次造成伤害时对其造成1.5秒<$ba.stun>晕眩</>效果
uniequip_003_hodrer.upgradeDescription: ATK increases to 120% when attacking an enemy; if the target is <$ba.stun>stunned</> or <$ba.root>bound</>, ATK further increases to 150%; When deals damage to blocked enemies for the first time, <$ba.stun>stuns</> them for 1.5 seconds
